gaps: No authorization for Vendor to process Personal Data to comply with legal obligations absent Customer instructions
Security measures are vague ('commercially suitable') without required technical safeguards (encryption, access controls, logging, vulnerability management, incident response)
Vendor may change operational controls without notice, undermining customer oversight
Personnel access not conditioned on confidentiality obligations; only onboarding materials required
Personal Data definition excludes derived, pseudonymized, aggregated, telemetry, log, and usage data, creating a de-identification loophole
Liability cap for data protection breaches limited to 3 months' fees and consequential damages excluded, not aligned with MSA cap
